channel.title: RINGFALL: CHAOS CIRCUIT
channel.description: Release notes for the original neon arcade wrestling game.

item.title: RINGFALL BODYWORKS enters The Volt Dome
item.description: Five original fighters, directional strikes, paired physical grapples, elastic ropes, turnbuckle aerials, spatial audio, optional WebXR, two rulesets, utility AI, props, pinfall, knockout, and instant rematch.
